75 A1550Z_NO_MR_DD_CD A1550Z_NO_MR_DD_CD A1550Z MR/DD Status: None of the Above CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that none of the above MR/DD (Mental Retardation or Developmental

0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)

76 A1600_ENTRY_DT A1600_ENTRY_DT A1600 Entry Date DATE 8 This column contains the date of entry (admission or reentry) into the facility.
